description: Schema for an ownership dispute record in the governance system.

package_name.description: The canonical name of the package in dispute.

complainant_id.description: Identifier of the party filing the dispute.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the dispute was created.

claim_reason.description: The detailed reason for the ownership claim.

evidence_links.description: Optional list of URLs containing evidence supporting the claim.

resolution_notes.description: Notes added upon resolution of the dispute.
